CustomField.description: Select this option if this bank account is used only for managed transactions where journal entries are not required. This will allow creation/update of bank accounts without entering a Cash GL Account if accounting functionality is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this option if this bank account is used only for managed transactions where journal entries are not required. This will allow creation/update of bank accounts without entering a Cash GL Account if accounting functionality is enabled.
CustomField.label: Used for Managed Assets (No Journals)
